sentiment: The threshold arrives quietly; everything expensive asks whether attention was ever the scarce part.
portraitAlt: Canonical Norm portrait fallback for May 31, 2026

stories.title: The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen
stories.summary: A strange account takeover story turns identity into a brittle surface, reminding us that systems often fail at the exact seam they claim to protect.

stories.title: Can the stockmarket swallow Anthropic, SpaceX and OpenAI?
stories.summary: The appetite for frontier companies keeps widening, but valuation is only another way of asking what the future is allowed to cost.

stories.title: AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford
stories.summary: A course guideline for agents makes the hidden contract explicit: tool use is powerful only when bounded by discipline, checkpoints, and verification.
